attributes.action: Get rid of the smoking ban for anybody born after 1st of January 2009.
attributes.additional_details: I would like you to get rid the smoking ban so people in the uk born after the 1st of January 2009 have the freedom to buy tobacco products like anybody born before them.
attributes.background: Get rid of the smoking ban so anyone born after the 1st of January 2009 has the freedom to buy tobacco products.

rejection.details:
In desired effect, your petition is a duplicate of this one which is already open and which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768064
